channel.title: The NHS Alliance - News
channel.description: Custom RSS feed for The NHS Alliance news

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to government announcement on expansion of pharmacy services
item.description: Ruth Rankine says the rollout of independent prescribing is a crucial step in unlocking the full expertise and community reach of pharmacies.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to Milburn review findings
item.description: Rebecca Gray responds to findings from Alan MIlburn's review into the increase in the number of young people who are Not in Education Employment or Training (NEET).

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to announcement of first six advanced foundation trusts
item.description: Dr Layla McCay responds to NHS England's announcement on the first six advanced foundation trusts.

item.title: The NHS Alliance comments on resident doctors strike in June
item.description: Matthew Hopkins says decision to strike yet again is rash and wholly irresponsible and will leave patients paying the price.

item.title: NHS leaders committed to working with new Welsh Government to deliver improvements
item.description: The Welsh NHS Confederation responds to the latest NHS Wales activity and performance statistics - the first with a new Welsh Government.

item.title: NHS leaders welcome whole-government approach to improving health in Wales
item.description: Director of the Welsh NHS Confederation Darren Hughes responds to the First Minister's priorities for the new Welsh Government.

item.title: The NHS Alliance comments on RCN mental health findings
item.description: Rebecca Gray responds to findings from the Royal College of Nursing on children in a mental health crisis in A&E.

item.title: Welsh NHS Confederation launches glossary to improve understanding of health and care terminology
Hard-won NHS gains at risk amid growing concerns of cuts to services
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane comments on findings in new report from The NHS Alliance, highlighting the impact of growing financial pressures.

item.title: The NHS Alliance welcomes cross-government mental health strategy
item.description: Rebecca Gray says it is a great opportunity to consider all aspects of mental health.

item.title: Matthew Hopkins appointed as interim acute and ambulance director
item.description: Matthew will lead the support that The NHS Alliance provides to acute and ambulance trusts in England.

item.title: Welcome progress, increased activity, but more demand for care
item.description: Dr Layla McCay responds to the latest NHS performance figures.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to health secretary's resignation
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane responds to Wes Streeting's resignation as Secretary of State for Health and Social Care

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to the King's Speech and NHS Modernisation Bill
item.description: Sarah Walter responds to the King's Speech and NHS Modernisation Bill

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to 'Stability beyond care' report
item.description: Rebecca Gray responds to publication of 'Stability beyond care' report

item.title: Focus on prevention to tackle falling healthy life expectancy
item.description: Dr Layla McCay responds to Health Foundation analysis showing that healthy life expectancy has fallen and the gap between affluent and deprived communities has grown.

item.title: "Helpful and timely" PAC report on the New Hospital Programme
item.description: Dr Layla McCay responds to the Public Accounts Committee's report on the New Hospital Programme.

item.title: Mental health performance target needed to address "appalling treatment gap"
item.description: Rebecca Gray calls for a new NHS mental health performance target for children and young people to help address an "appalling treatment gap" for people with mental ill health who can’t access care.

item.title: Genuine performance progress will make a difference for thousands of NHS patients
item.description: Rory Deighton responds to the latest NHS performance figures.

item.title: Health and Care Women Leaders Network responds to the government's renewed Women's Health Strategy
item.description: Salma Yasmeen, chair of the Health and Care Women Leaders Network, responds to the government's renewed Women's Health Strategy.
